_comment: Benchmark data for COAS dashboard comparisons. Update these values as research improves.
_avgSessionDurationSeconds_note: Higher ed national avg ~2:00-2:20 (120-140 sec). Source: Google Analytics benchmarks for education sector.
_engagementRatePct_note: Typical higher ed engagement rate ~50%. GA4 engagement = sessions lasting 10s+ or 2+ pageviews. Source: industry benchmarks.
_seoScoreGood_note: Siteimprove considers 80+ a good SEO score.
_accessibilityScoreGood_note: Siteimprove considers 80+ a good accessibility score. WCAG 2.1 AA compliance target.
_peerAvgSessions_note: Set this to the 90-day session count of a peer college website if you have that data. Leave at 0 to hide the comparison. Example: 45000 for a comparable R1 college of arts and sciences.
